text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm walking around<n>town...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
All right! Now that I'm done at the<n>crepe shop,
I've got my shift at the<n>convenience store
coming up in...<n>about ten minutes.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I really want to use this time to<n>train, but...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you! Perfect timing! Do you<n>think I can
pick your brain for a sec?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Do you know any training exercises I<n>can do in
ten minutes?
choice_data_list: Use the time to check your running form.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, you're right! I might as well<n>just start
running rather than waste<n>time trying to think of
something!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! I never would have thought to<n>check my
running form!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, I haven't<n>gone back to
the basics for a while...<n>Yeah, that's perfect!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the advice! I'm gonna get<n>right into it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But before that, I've got some insider<n>info in
exchange for your kindness!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You should definitely drop by that<n>crepe shop on
Mondays! I'll give you<n>a discount as thanks for
today! ♪
